data.title: Faraday Future unveils details on the FX Super One's FF Super EAI F.A.C.E. System, offering multimodal interaction and smartphone control.
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. announced new information today regarding its upcoming F.A.C.E. System, available as an option on the fully electric FX Super One MPV. The acronym stands for “Front AI Communication Ecosystem,” offering multimodal interaction through voice, gesture, and touch. This system provides proactive suggestions and real-time assistance, controlled via a smartphone app. Users can display custom art, logos, messages, and stream videos. Faraday Future, a California-based company, is a global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol FFAI.

data.title: CoinEx launched Futures Trial Funds to offer new users a chance to experience real futures trading with zero principal, reducing barriers.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 13, 2026, CoinEx introduced Futures Trial Funds in Rewards Center to allow new users to try futures trading without investing their own money. This initiative aims to make futures trading more accessible by reducing barriers for interested users. The program enables participants to experience real futures trading using trial funds before committing their own capital.

data.title: EVA Air ranked 8th safest global airline for 2026 by AirlineRatings.com, its 13th consecutive year in the top list.
data.description: In the latest rankings released on January 13, 2026, EVA Air has secured the eighth spot on the list of the "Top 25 Safest Full-Service Airlines for 2026" by AirlineRatings.com. This achievement signifies the airline's impressive track record, as it marks the 13th consecutive year that EVA Air has been recognized among the safest airlines globally by the prominent website. Notably, this recognition highlights EVA Air's commitment to ensuring passenger safety and enhancing its standing in the aviation industry.

data.title: Crypto treasuries outpace Bitcoin supply with a 3:1 ratio. 260,000 BTC added by corporate treasuries in 6 months, 60% held by Strategy.
data.description: Over the span of six months, corporate Bitcoin treasuries saw a significant increase of 260,000 BTC, which is three times the amount that was mined within that time frame. Strategy now accounts for 60% of all corporate holdings in Bitcoin.

data.title: Record $702M prediction market volume, with Kalshi leading with 2/3 of $701.7M trades on Monday amid scrutiny.
data.description: On Monday, Kalshi, a prediction market platform, was the leader in trading volumes, making up 66% of the total tally which amounted to $701.7 million.

data.title: KCM Trade debuts research report series empowering investors with expert market intelligence. Inaugural report released Jan 14, 2026.
data.description: A prominent Contract for Difference (CFD) broker, KCM Trade, based in Hong Kong, unveiled its exclusive research report series on January 14, 2026. The first report titled "An..." is aimed at providing crucial market insights to investors worldwide. KCM Trade aims to empower global investors with expert market intelligence through these reports.
